learners.about:
Hi! I’m Rachana Hadke, an aspiring data analyst who loves finding the stories in numbers. _x000D_
I focus on turning raw data into useful insights that help make smarter and quicker decisions._x000D_
_x000D_
Whether I’m diving into complex datasets or crafting visually compelling dashboards, I thrive on solving real-world problems with data. _x000D_
I’ve worked on projects across finance, retail, and sports, where I’ve helped identify trends and improve strategies using data._x000D_
_x000D_
I’m also a lifelong learner—constantly upskilling through certifications and challenging projects, pushing the boundaries of what data can achieve. _x000D_
If you’re looking for someone who can not only analyze data but transform it into a competitive advantage, let’s connect!
learners.experience:
Analyst - Capgemini, Mumbai
Nov 2020 - Dec 2022
Data-Driven Operations
: Analyzed and resolved over 2 incidents per day. Used SQL and Excel to identify patterns to prevent future issues, significantly improving service reliability.
Collaboration & Communication
: Worked closely with the development and operations teams to analyze system performance, share insights, and implement data-driven solutions to improve business outcomes.

projects.short_description: This project focuses on analyzing the company's sales performance and market standing.  The insights provided by advanced Excel techniques such as Pivot Tables and Power Query,  help the sales team optimize strategies, improve customer relationships, and track market goals effectively.
projects.description:
In this project, I developed a sales report using Excel Pivot Tables to help businesses understand their sales performance better. This report is a powerful tool for identifying the best customer discounts, making negotiations easier, and finding new markets to explore._x000D_
_x000D_
The insights from these reports can help businesses improve their sales strategies, boost customer satisfaction, and increase revenue._x000D_
_x000D_
During this project, I learned how to:_x000D_
_x000D_
1. Use Pivot Tables for quick data analysis._x000D_
2. Apply Power Query for smooth data processing._x000D_
3. Understand the basics of DAX (Data Analysis Expressions)._x000D_
4. Use Conditional Formatting to highlight important information._x000D_
5. Make reports visually appealing and easy to read._x000D_
6. Analyze key sales metrics effectively._x000D_
_x000D_
Overall, this project gives businesses the insights they need to enhance their sales efforts and discover new growth opportunities through data analysis.

projects.short_description: AtliQ Hardware faced challenges managing data in Excel, limiting insights into key areas. My objective was to transition the company to Power BI, enabling better analysis of finance, sales, and supply chain, utilizing a substantial dataset of 1.8 million entries for informed decision-making.
projects.description:
The main aim of this project was to create a comprehensive dashboard for stakeholders across sales, marketing, finance, and the executive team. The focus areas included:_x000D_
_x000D_
Robust Data Model: Building a solid foundation for data analysis._x000D_
User-Friendly Design: Creating intuitive reports that cater to user needs._x000D_
Interactive Insights: Offering drillable features for in-depth data exploration._x000D_
_x000D_
I learned the following things in this project_x000D_
_x000D_
1. Power Query (Basic and Advanced Operations) _x000D_
2. Basic and complex DAX formulas_x000D_
3. Data modelling involving 10+ tables_x000D_
4. Choosing the right visuals and formatting_x000D_
5. Dashboard designing principles_x000D_
6. Using bookmarks_x000D_
7. Deploying in Power BI service_x000D_
8. Stakeholder Feedback Implementation_x000D_
9. Sales, Marketing, Finance & Supply Chain metrics

projects.short_description: This IPL Cricket Analysis project dives into match data to uncover trends and insights. The goal is to evaluate player performances, team strategies, and match outcomes, helping teams and fans understand the game better and make informed predictions for future matches.
projects.description:
The IPL Cricket Analysis project aims to explore match data to uncover trends, player performances, and team strategies. Using various datasets, I analyzed key metrics such as runs scored, wickets taken, and player statistics to evaluate how different factors influence match outcomes._x000D_
_x000D_
I created visualizations to illustrate _x000D_
- trends over seasons_x000D_
-highlight top-performing players_x000D_
-analyze team strengths and weaknesses_x000D_
_x000D_
This analysis not only provides insights for teams and coaches but also enhances fan engagement by offering a deeper understanding of the game._x000D_
_x000D_
Throughout this project, I learned:_x000D_
_x000D_
1. Data cleaning and preparation techniques._x000D_
2. The importance of effective data visualization to communicate insights._x000D_
3. Advanced statistical methods to analyze player and team performances._x000D_
4. Key cricket metrics that impact game outcomes.

projects.short_description: This project analyzes the impact of promotional campaigns on AtliQ Mart's branded products during Diwali 2023 and Sankranti 2024. By evaluating sales data and customer response, we aim to identify successful strategies and provide actionable insights for future marketing efforts.
projects.description:
In this Promotion Effectiveness Analysis project for AtliQ Mart, I explored how promotional campaigns during Diwali 2023 and Sankranti 2024 impacted sales of AtliQ branded products. By diving into sales data, I uncovered valuable insights that can shape future marketing strategies._x000D_
_x000D_
Achieved Objectives:_x000D_
_x000D_
1. Established key performance indicators (KPIs) to evaluate promotional success._x000D_
2. Developed an interactive dashboard based on stakeholder requirements._x000D_
3. Leveraged Power BI for data visualization._x000D_
4. Used DAX to create advanced calculations and measures._x000D_
_x000D_
This experience enhanced my analytical skills and deepened my understanding of marketing dynamics in retail.

projects.project_title: Data analysis in Hospitality Domain using Python
projects.short_description: Analyzed booking data for AtliQ Grands, a hotel chain, using Python to uncover key insights into occupancy rates, revenue trends, and customer behavior. Delivered actionable recommendations to optimize hotel performance, boost revenue, and market share.
projects.description:
- Applied exploratory data analysis (EDA) to uncover trends in occupancy rates, room types, and booking platforms._x000D_
- Created key metrics, Occupancy Percentage, to assess performance across cities and room categories._x000D_
- Visualized data  to identify patterns in revenue realization and occupancy rates._x000D_
- Developed actionable recommendations to improve occupancy, optimize pricing strategies, and target underperforming cities._x000D_
- Gained hands-on experience in data cleaning, transformation, and visualization, enhancing my Python tool skills for data analysis.

projects.project_title: Data analysis in consumer goods domain using SQL
projects.short_description: AtliQ Hardware Sales Analysis: Analyzed sales and operational data to uncover insights on customer segments, product performance, and trends. Used SQL for analysis, Power BI to create impactful visualizations, and applied data storytelling techniques to enhance decision-making.
projects.description: Conducted an in-depth analysis of sales and operational data for AtliQ Hardware, focusing on customer insights, product performance, sales trends, and discount effectiveness. Leveraged tools such as SQL and Power BI to extract, clean, and visualize data, creating visuals that highlighted key metrics and actionable insights. Identified top-performing products, high-discount customers, and trends to support strategic decision-making. Applied data storytelling techniques to present findings effectively, demonstrating the impact of data-driven insights. This project not only enhanced my technical skills but also emphasized the importance of aligning analytics with business objectives.

projects.short_description: I developed comprehensive Sales and Financial reports to give the sales team deeper insights into customer performance and market trends, helping them better assess progress against their targets.
projects.description:
In this project, I developed a series of reports aimed at delivering in-depth insights for stakeholders:_x000D_
Customer Performance Report: Analyzed sales data and growth trends to understand customer behavior over time._x000D_
Market Performance vs Sales Targets Comparison: Conducted a detailed analysis of market performance versus sales targets to identify achievements and gaps._x000D_
Profit & Loss (P&L) Reports by Fiscal Year & Months: Evaluated financial performance across different time frames to reveal profitability trends._x000D_
P&L Reports by Markets: Benchmarked market-wise financial performance against industry standards._x000D_
_x000D_
Developed a complete lifecycle of an Excel-based project. Automated the data cleaning and processing using Power Query, which can save around 4 hrs of repeated manual work. It’s provided a better user experience and flexibility.

projects.short_description: This Project includes a comprehensive end-to-end Power BI analysis of Uber's business performance. It converts unprocessed ride-level data into useful insights about operations, revenue, consumer behavior, geographic trends, and strategic suggestions.
projects.description: Uber is a global mobility platform that uses real-time technology to connect drivers and passengers.Using reliable data modeling and visualization, this project seeks to examine trip performance, cancellation patterns, revenue trends, and operational effectiveness.This Project includes a comprehensive end-to-end Power BI analysis of Uber's business performance. It converts unprocessed ride-level data into useful insights about operations, revenue, consumer behavior, geographic trends, and strategic suggestions.

projects.short_description: AtliQ Hardware, a leading computer hardware producer, faced challenges in making data-driven decisions. To solve this, they needed a comprehensive report to analyze business queries. This involved utilizing SQL for data analysis  presentation with actionable insights.
projects.description:
Company: AtliQ Hardwares (an imaginary leading computer hardware producer in India with a global presence)_x000D_
_x000D_
Challenge: AtliQ Hardwares aimed to enhance data-driven decision-making by expanding their analytics team. Tony Sharma, the Data Analytics Director, devised a SQL challenge to evaluate candidates' technical and soft skills._x000D_
_x000D_
My Task: As a hypothetical applicant, I Reviewed 'ad-hoc-requests.pdf' with 10 business queries._x000D_
Crafted and executed SQL queries._x000D_
_x000D_
_x000D_
Approach: Utilized MySQL for data retrieval and analysis. _x000D_
_x000D_
Outcome: This project demonstrated my ability to handle complex data queries and present findings effectively, enhancing both my technical & problem solving ability.

projects.short_description:
End-to-End Python Data Analysis Project_x000D_
Analyzing hotel booking cancellations to reduce revenue leakage and optimize operational efficiency in the hospitality domain.
projects.description: This project addresses the critical business problem of high cancellation rates affecting both City Hotels (41.7%) and Resort Hotels (27.8%). Through comprehensive data analysis of 118,897 booking records, we identify key drivers of cancellations and provide actionable strategic recommendations.

👨🏻‍💼𝐄𝐱𝐞𝐜𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐕𝐢𝐞𝐰: An essential section tailored for executives, delivering crucial metrics, revenue contributions, trend charts, and detailed tables.

projects.short_description: 🔍𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗢𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗲𝘄: Mitron Bank is set to introduce groundbreaking credit cards. AtliQ Data Services kicks off by meticulously analyzing a dataset encompassing the online spending habits of 4000 customers.
projects.description:
🎯𝗧𝗮𝗿𝗴𝗲𝘁 𝗔𝗰𝗾𝘂𝗶𝘀𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: Our objectives were crystal clear:_x000D_
- Unleash the power of data insights to refine the credit card development process._x000D_
- Steer strategies that align seamlessly with customer preferences and dynamic market trends._x000D_
_x000D_
📊𝗜𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘀: Our dive into demographics, spending behaviour, and customer segments was an eye-opener. The insights gathered from 4000 customers spanning cities, professions, and age brackets were pivotal in shaping our strategies._x000D_
_x000D_
𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐅𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬💡_x000D_
1. Credit cards are the top choice for customer payments.💳_x000D_
2. Major spending categories include bills, groceries, electronics, and health-wellness products.🛒📱💊_x000D_
3. Male and married customers dominate the spending trends.👨‍👩‍👦‍👦💰_x000D_
4. The 25-35 and 35-45 age groups exhibit the highest spending patterns.👨‍💼👩‍💼💵_x000D_
5. Mumbai emerges as the top spending city among all.🏙️💸_x000D_
6. Salaried IT Employees and Other Salaried Employees drive the majority of transactions.💼💻💰

projects.short_description: 🔍𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗢𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗲𝘄: AtliQ Mart, a prominent retail chain with 50 supermarkets in southern India, conducted extensive promotions-for their AtliQ branded products during Diwali 2023 and Sankranti 2024. projects.short_description: Using SQL queries🔍10 AD-HOC requests guided AtliQ's success journey with data. Key insights revealed📈increased product diversity, dominance in 'Notebook' sales📒, and seasonal trends📊. SQL, Power BI, and PowerPoint tools were utilized.🛠️

projects.project_title: AtliQ Grand Data Analysis Project Using Python 🐍

🌟𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐣𝐞𝐜𝐭 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬:_x000D_
_x000D_
● 𝐃𝐚𝐭𝐚 𝐂𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠: Eliminated missing values and outliers to ensure pristine data quality._x000D_
_x000D_
● 𝐃𝐚𝐭𝐚 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐬𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: Added occupancy percentage columns for richer insights._x000D_
_x000D_
📊𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬 𝐔𝐧𝐜𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐝:_x000D_
_x000D_
● 𝐀𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐠𝐞 𝐎𝐜𝐜𝐮𝐩𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐲 𝐑𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐛𝐲 𝐑𝐨𝐨𝐦 𝐓𝐲𝐩𝐞._x000D_

● 𝐎𝐜𝐜𝐮𝐩𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐲 𝐑𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐨𝐧 𝐖𝐞𝐞𝐤𝐝𝐚𝐲𝐬 𝐕𝐒 𝐖𝐞𝐞𝐤𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐬._x000D_

projects.short_description: This challenge focused on uncovering insights for AtliQ Motors, which holds a 25% market share in North America but under 2% in India. Led by Bruce Haryali, we set out to decode the Indian EV market.
projects.description:
‎ ‎🚗 𝗢𝗯𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲:_x000D_
_x000D_
 ● Grasp the current landscape of the EV market in India._x000D_
 ● Spot key trends and identify growth opportunities._x000D_
 ● Break down sales data by state, manufacturer, and vehicle category._x000D_
 ● Deliver actionable insights and strategies to boost AtliQ Motors' market share._x000D_
_x000D_
_x000D_
🔍 𝗞𝗲𝘆 𝗧𝗮𝗸𝗲𝗮𝘄𝗮𝘆𝘀:_x000D_
_x000D_
🏆 𝗧𝗼𝗽 𝗘𝗩 𝗠𝗮𝗸𝗲𝗿𝘀 (𝗙𝗬 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟯 & 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟰):_x000D_
 ● 𝗢𝗟𝗔 𝗘𝗹𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗰: Leading the pack for two consecutive years, while smaller players like Jitendra and Battre Electric are struggling to keep up._x000D_
_x000D_
🌍 𝗧𝗼𝗽 𝗦𝘁𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀 𝗯𝘆 𝗘𝗩 𝗣𝗲𝗻𝗲𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 (𝗙𝗬 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟰):_x000D_
 ● 𝗚𝗼𝗮: Dominates in 2-wheeler adoption!_x000D_
 ● 𝗞𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗹𝗮: Excelling in both 2-wheelers and 4-wheelers.💥_x000D_
_x000D_
📊 𝗤𝘂𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗹𝘆 𝗧𝗿𝗲𝗻𝗱𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗟𝗲𝗮𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝟰-𝗪𝗵𝗲𝗲𝗹𝗲𝗿 𝗘𝗩 𝗠𝗮𝗸𝗲𝗿𝘀:_x000D_
 ● 𝗧𝗮𝘁𝗮 𝗠𝗼𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘀: Outpacing competitors with the highest quarterly growth. 🔥

projects.short_description: This project, created for the Codebasics Supply Chain Challenge, helps AtliQ Mart improve order fulfillment. The dashboard tracks key metrics like OT%, IF%, OTIF, LIFR, and VOFR across cities, customers, and product categories.
projects.description:
🚨 𝗞𝗲𝘆 𝗙𝗶𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴𝘀:_x000D_
_x000D_
📉 𝗟𝗼𝘄 𝗙𝘂𝗹𝗳𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗥𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀:_x000D_
_x000D_
● OTIF (On-Time In-Full) performance is WAY below target: 29.02% vs. a target of 66%_x000D_
_x000D_
● OT% stands at 59% — far from the target of 86%_x000D_
_x000D_
● IF% is at 52.78%, underperforming the target of 77%_x000D_
_x000D_
🌆 𝗖𝗶𝘁𝘆-𝘄𝗶𝘀𝗲 𝗣𝗲𝗿𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲:_x000D_
_x000D_
● Surat performed slightly better in OT%, but all three cities (Ahmedabad, Surat, Vadodara) missed the OTIF target._x000D_
_x000D_
💡 𝗖𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗿 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘀:_x000D_
_x000D_
● Lotus Mart is lagging with a poor OTIF of 16.3%, compared to Propel Mart at 40.9%._x000D_
_x000D_
● Despite delays, VOFR remains high (~97%), showing that while quantity is fulfilled, it's not on time._x000D_
_x000D_
🛍️ 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁 𝗣𝗲𝗿𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲:_x000D_
_x000D_
● Major products like AM Biscuits and AM Butter exhibit a consistent LIFR of ~66% and VOFR of ~96%, pointing to inventory or delivery planning issues._x000D_
_x000D_
⏰ 𝗗𝗲𝗹𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘆 𝗗𝗲𝗹𝗮𝘆𝘀:_x000D_
_x000D_
● 13,000+ orders were delivered late!_x000D_
_x000D_
● The average delay per order: 1.69 days, highlighting scheduling ineffi

projects.project_title: Amazon Sales Analytics: SQL- Powered Data Exploration 📈
projects.short_description: Analyzed 1,000+ Amazon sales records across Mandalay, Yangon, and Naypyitaw using SQL to uncover sales trends, high-performing product lines, and customer demographics. Delivered insights to improve marketing strategies, inventory management, and customer targeting.
projects.description:
This project involved a comprehensive analysis of Amazon’s sales data from three key locations: Mandalay, Yangon, and Naypyitaw. Using SQL, I explored 1,000 transaction records to identify patterns in customer behavior, revenue generation, and product performance._x000D_
_x000D_
Key objectives included:_x000D_
_x000D_
● Determining monthly revenue trends_x000D_
_x000D_
● Identifying top-performing product lines and customer types_x000D_
_x000D_
● Classifying sales performance as "Good" or "Bad"_x000D_
_x000D_
● Analyzing gender distribution, VAT impacts, and branch-wise performance_x000D_
_x000D_
The analysis provided actionable insights to help Amazon refine its sales strategy, improve inventory decisions, and deliver more personalized customer experiences.

projects.short_description: In this project, I delved into 𝗡𝗲𝘁𝗳𝗹𝗶𝘅 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗬𝗼𝘂𝗧𝘂𝗯𝗲 𝗱𝗮𝘁𝗮 using 𝗣𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿 𝗕𝗜, transforming raw data into actionable insights. From cleaning and preparing data in 𝗣𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿 𝗤𝘂𝗲𝗿𝘆 to creating an interactive dashboard, this experience was both challenging and rewarding.
projects.description:
📸 𝗛𝗲𝗿𝗲’𝘀 𝗮 𝘀𝗻𝗮𝗽𝘀𝗵𝗼𝘁 𝗼𝗳 𝘄𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗜 𝘂𝗻𝗰𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗿𝗲𝗱:_x000D_
_x000D_
🔍 𝗞𝗲𝘆 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘀 𝗳𝗿𝗼𝗺 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗮:_x000D_
✅ 𝟭𝟭.𝟭 𝗕𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗩𝗶𝗲𝘄𝘀 𝗔𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘆𝘇𝗲𝗱:_x000D_
_x000D_
● 𝟴𝟴.𝟱% 𝗼𝗳 𝘃𝗶𝗲𝘄𝘀 came from videos with specific tag counts._x000D_
● 𝗦𝗵𝗼𝗿𝘁 𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼𝘀 dominated with 𝟵.𝟴 𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝘃𝗶𝗲𝘄𝘀, followed by medium and long videos._x000D_
_x000D_
🎥 𝗧𝗼𝗽-𝗣𝗲𝗿𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗻𝘁:_x000D_
_x000D_
● 🥇 "𝗠𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘆 𝗟𝗶𝘁𝘁𝗹𝗲 𝗕𝗵𝗲𝗲𝗺" topped the charts with 𝟴𝟴𝟴 𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝘃𝗶𝗲𝘄𝘀._x000D_
● Other hits included "𝗕𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗮 𝗖𝗶𝗮𝗼" 🎶 and "𝗕𝗵𝗲𝗲𝗺 𝗖𝗼𝗼𝗸𝘀 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗕𝗲𝘀𝘁 𝗣𝗼𝗻𝗴𝗮𝗹"🍲._x000D_
● The 𝘁𝗼𝗽 𝟱 𝗺𝗼𝘀𝘁-𝗹𝗶𝗸𝗲𝗱 𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼𝘀 collectively garnered 𝟭𝟬.𝟭𝟴 𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗹𝗶𝗸𝗲𝘀!_x000D_
_x000D_
📅 𝗧𝗿𝗲𝗻𝗱𝘀 𝗢𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗲:_x000D_
_x000D_
● 𝗪𝗲𝗱𝗻𝗲𝘀𝗱𝗮𝘆𝘀 were the most engaging day, with 𝟮.𝟯𝟰 𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝘃𝗶𝗲𝘄𝘀._x000D_
● 𝗠𝗮𝗿𝗰𝗵 saw the highest video uploads (𝟱𝟬𝟭 𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼𝘀), while 𝗔𝗽𝗿𝗶𝗹 had the lowest (𝟯𝟰𝟴 𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼𝘀).

projects.short_description: Shield Insurance, a visionary company dedicated to innovative insurance solutions, aims to deliver comprehensive protection and financial security to its customers. My project focused on analyzing customer growth, revenue generation, and policy trends to provide actionable insights.
projects.description:
📊𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐎𝐛𝐣𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐬: _x000D_
_x000D_
 ● Track customer count and total revenue generated. _x000D_
 ● Evaluate daily revenue and customer growth rates. _x000D_
 ● Analyze month-over-month policy trends for improvement areas. _x000D_
_x000D_
📁 𝐃𝐚𝐭𝐚 𝐔𝐭𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐳𝐞𝐝: The project leveraged data from five CSV files, encompassing customer details, policy data, and premium settlements. This comprehensive data model enabled a deep dive into customer behavior, policy performance, and settlement outcomes._x000D_
_x000D_
💡𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬: _x000D_
_x000D_
📈March 2023 saw the peak in both revenue and customer acquisition._x000D_
_x000D_
🏙️Delhi NCR led in revenue and customer count._x000D_
_x000D_
🕵️‍♂️The Offline-Agent sales mode proved to be the most effective in attracting customers and generating revenue._x000D_
_x000D_
👥The 31-40 age bracket played a major role in boosting both revenue and customer numbers._x000D_
_x000D_
🌟‘POL4321HEL’ is the standout policy, attracting more than 4,000 customers.

projects.short_description:
Created a Streamlit–MySQL tracker reducing monthly tracking effort 45% using structured workflows shaped via user interviews._x000D_
Improved data reliability and displayed pandas insights increasing clarity 40%  through refined visual layouts.
projects.description:
Overview: Developed an expense management application with a clean and interactive UI powered by Streamlit and a robust backend built with FastAPI._x000D_
_x000D_
Frontend: Created an easy-to-navigate dashboard using Streamlit, enabling users to input, view, and manage financial data with real-time responsiveness._x000D_
_x000D_
Backend: Engineered a RESTful API using FastAPI to handle data CRUD operations, enforce business logic, and provide a scalable foundation for future enhancements._x000D_
_x000D_
Testing: Implemented comprehensive testing frameworks for both frontend and backend, ensuring reliability and ease of maintenance._x000D_
_x000D_
Deployment Workflow:_x000D_
->Install dependencies via pip install -r requirements.txt_x000D_
->Launch the service with uvicorn server.server:app --reload_x000D_
->Start the UI with streamlit run frontend/app.py_x000D_
_x000D_
Key Strengths: Modular architecture (separating UI and API), emphasis on testing, and clean documentation for smooth onboarding.

projects.short_description: Performed end-to-end data cleaning, feature engineering, and A/B testing to compare a new credit card variant with the existing one. Used statistical methods to quantify uplift and support data-driven launch strategies.
projects.description:
This project focuses on evaluating the effectiveness of a newly introduced credit card variant using real customer transaction data. The workflow includes extensive data preprocessing—handling missing values, removing outliers, validating data quality—and creating analytical features to measure customer spending patterns._x000D_
An A/B testing framework was applied by segmenting customers into control and test groups, followed by descriptive statistics and a formal Z-test to measure whether the new credit card led to a statistically significant uplift in spending behavior. Insightful visualizations and comparative metrics highlight how the new variant performs against the existing product._x000D_
The project concludes with actionable business recommendations, helping stakeholders assess whether the new credit card variant is ready for full-scale rollout and providing a data-backed foundation for launch strategy decisions.

projects.short_description: This project builds a machine learning model to predict health insurance premiums using demographic, lifestyle, and medical factors. It includes data cleaning, feature engineering, model comparison, and a full end-to-end predictive pipeline.
projects.description:
The Health Insurance Premium Prediction project aims to build a complete machine learning system that accurately estimates insurance premiums using demographic, lifestyle, and medical attributes. The process begins with extensive data cleaning, including handling missing values, outliers, and data inconsistencies to ensure a reliable dataset. Detailed EDA is performed to understand relationships between age, BMI, smoking status, region, and premium costs._x000D_
Advanced feature engineering techniques such as encoding, scaling, and interaction-term creation are applied to improve model performance. Multiple regression models—Linear Regression, Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, and XGBoost—are trained and evaluated using RMSE, MAE, and R². Hyperparameter tuning further enhances accuracy._x000D_
The final output is an optimized ML pipeline capable of generating fast, reliable premium predictions, providing value for insurance companies in pricing strategy and risk assessment.

projects.short_description: A machine learning–based credit risk modeling system that predicts the likelihood of loan default using customer, loan, and bureau data. Includes data preprocessing, feature engineering, model comparison, hyperparameter tuning, and a Streamlit web app for real-time predictions.
projects.description:
This project focuses on building an end-to-end Credit Risk Modeling system to predict the probability of loan default using customer, loan, and bureau data. It includes extensive data preprocessing, handling missing values, outlier treatment, encoding, and feature scaling. Advanced feature engineering techniques were applied to create meaningful risk indicators._x000D_
_x000D_
Multiple machine learning models—Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, and LightGBM—were trained and compared using metrics such as ROC-AUC, F1-score, and precision-recall. Automated hyperparameter tuning was performed using Optuna to maximize model performance._x000D_
_x000D_
The best-performing model was deployed through an interactive Streamlit web application, enabling users to input customer details and instantly receive a risk prediction score. The system supports real-world credit screening by improving decision-making, reducing default risk, and enhancing financial transparency.

projects.short_description: Car Damage Detection is a deep learning–based computer vision project that automatically classifies vehicle damage types from images using a ResNet50 CNN model, enabling faster and more accurate damage assessment through a real-time Streamlit application.
projects.description:
The Car Damage Detection project focuses on automating vehicle damage assessment using Deep Learning and Computer Vision techniques. The system uses a ResNet50-based Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with transfer learning to classify car images into multiple damage categories such as front/rear normal, breakage, and crushed conditions._x000D_
_x000D_
The project involves image preprocessing and normalization, model fine-tuning with layer freezing and dropout to improve generalization, and class-wise evaluation to ensure reliable performance under real-world image variability. The trained PyTorch model is serialized and integrated into a Streamlit-based web application, allowing users to upload images and receive instant damage predictions._x000D_
_x000D_
This solution demonstrates an end-to-end ML pipeline, covering data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, and deployment, and is well-suited for applications in insurance claim processing, vehicle inspection, and automotive analytics.

projects.short_description: Built a GenAI-powered research system using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to ingest and analyze real estate articles. Automated preprocessing, semantic retrieval, and conversational querying improved answer accuracy, reduced manual effort, and enabled faster, reliable research insights.
projects.description: Designed and developed a domain-restricted, production-style Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system to answer questions strictly from verified real estate journalism. The application ingests web-based articles, performs automated data cleaning, semantic chunking, and dense embedding generation, and stores vectors in a searchable database for context retrieval. Leveraged LangChain to orchestrate the end-to-end RAG pipeline, ensuring responses are grounded only in retrieved content and preventing hallucinations. Implemented vector-based similarity search to support accurate multi-document question answering with sub-second response times. Designed a session-safe conversational memory mechanism combining recent context retention and summarized history to maintain conversational continuity while keeping the backend stateless. Deployed the application on a cloud-ready Streamlit interface, enabling reliable multi-user access and scalable interaction with real-world data.

projects.short_description: Built an AI-powered e-commerce assistant using semantic routing, RAG, and LLM-driven text-to-SQL. The system intelligently routes queries to FAQ, database, or general QA pipelines, delivering grounded, context-aware responses through a Streamlit interface.
projects.description: This project implements an AI-powered e-commerce assistant that mirrors production LLM system architectures. User queries are embedded and routed using semantic similarity to intent-specific pipelines, including a RAG-based FAQ engine backed by a vector database, a safeguarded LLM-driven text-to-SQL layer for querying structured product data, and a fallback clarification agent to prevent hallucinations. The system supports multi-turn conversations through session-level memory and summarization, improving response coherence and trust. Developed using Python, Streamlit, Groq LLMs, ChromaDB, SQLite, and sentence-transformer embeddings, the project demonstrates end-to-end AI orchestration, reasoning over structured and unstructured data, and real-world deployment considerations.

learners.about:
I work as a Senior DevOps Engineer, mainly responsible for designing and operating Azure-based platforms. My role spans infrastructure automation using Terraform, AKS platform engineering, CI/CD standardization, and production incident management._x000D_
_x000D_
I’ve supported multiple teams across EUAM, UBAM, and BBGW, VertexM, BGW  where I not only handled deployments but also guided teams on cost optimization, release best practices, and operational stability._x000D_
_x000D_
I’m particularly strong in troubleshooting production issues, improving deployment reliability, and ensuring cloud environments are both scalable and cost-efficient.

projects.short_description: This project analyzes the Customer Shopping Dataset – Retail Sales Data from Kaggle, which contains transaction-level data from 10 shopping malls in Istanbul.
projects.description:
This project analyzes the Customer Shopping Dataset – Retail Sales Data from Kaggle, which contains transaction-level data from 10 shopping malls in Istanbul._x000D_
_x000D_
The goal of the project is to understand where customers spend the most, which categories are most popular by gender, and how payment preferences differ across the customer base.
